svg.title: Flit account connect flow — per platform
svg.desc: Five steps: tap connect, WebView opens, user logs in on platform, session token captured and encrypted, platform marked connected.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the platform connect screen look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the in-app WebView work for platform login?')
sendPrompt('Why is it safe for users to log in via the WebView?')
sendPrompt('How does the app capture and encrypt the session token?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a platform is connected in Flit?')

svg.text: Search proxy attaches the right token per platform per user
